title: viola elegantula
intro: Viola elegantula, also known as the woodland viola or pansy violet, is a species of flowering plant in the viola genus. It is native to Eastern North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory infections, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Viola elegantula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to relieve symptoms associated with colds, fever, and other illnesses.
